name: pilot-angular
description: Angular / TypeScript codebase governance: component patterns, signal migration, standalone best practices, accessibility audits, version-gated coding standards, multi-layout shells, theming, shared UI libraries, JSON-schema-driven dynamic reactive forms, permissions-ONLY route guards/UI gating (no role checks), testing conventions (Testing Library, harnesses, e2e), i18n (shared key space with dotnet-localization, locale formatting, RTL), global error handling (ProblemDetails-aware), PWA/offline support, frontend telemetry (Application Insights JS SDK, trace-ID correlation), and Nx/module-federation monorepo governance
